title: Supporting internet protocol version 4 (ipv4) extension headers
abstract: A method implemented by a network element (NE) comprises receiving, by a receiver of the NE, an Internet Protocol (IP) version 4 (IPv4) packet from another NE, wherein the IPv4 packet comprises an IPv4 header, an extension header, and upper layer data, wherein the IPv4 header comprises a protocol number associated with the extension header, and wherein the IPv4 packet comprises a total length of the extension header, and processing, by a processor coupled to the receiver, the IPv4 packet based on the total length of the extension header
claims: Claims ( 20 ) AĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â implementedĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â elementĂ‚Â (NE)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â comprising: receiving,Ă‚Â byĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â receiverĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â NE,Ă‚Â anĂ‚Â InternetĂ‚Â ProtocolĂ‚Â (IP)Ă‚Â versionĂ‚Â 4Ă‚Â (IPv4)Ă‚Â packetĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â anotherĂ‚Â NE,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â IPv4Ă‚Â packetĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â IPv4Ă‚Â header,Ă‚Â anĂ‚Â extensionĂ‚Â header,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â upperĂ‚Â layerĂ‚Â data,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â IPv4Ă‚Â headerĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â protocolĂ‚Â numberĂ‚Â associatedĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â extensionĂ‚Â header,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â IPv4Ă‚Â packetĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â totalĂ‚Â lengthĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â extensionĂ‚Â header;Ă‚Â and processing,Ă‚Â byĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â coupledĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â receiver,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â IPv4Ă‚Â packetĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â totalĂ‚Â lengthĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â extensionĂ‚Â header.
